authLoginDescription: Use your Google account to enter the admin console
forbiddenDescription: This account does not have the admin role and cannot access console configuration.
promptDescription: Configure the assistant and dialog defaults.
settingsBasicEmptyDescription: General configuration items can be added here later.
settingsOtherEmptyDescription: Advanced or extended configuration items can be added here later.
modelSettingsDescription: Manually maintain available models and assign capability tags.
modelSettingsEmptyDescription: Add a model, then select the capabilities it supports.
modelSettingsPrimaryModelDescription: Choose the default model for text generation and tool calling.
modelSettingsPrimaryModelInvalid: The primary model must support both text generation and tool calling
modelSettingsEmbeddingModelDescription: Choose the default model for embedding generation.
modelSettingsEmbeddingModelInvalid: The embedding model must support embedding generation
toolSettingsDescription: Maintain tools that models can call and configure Zod object schemas with fields.
toolSettingsToolDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this tool does and when it should be called.
toolSettingsInvocationDescription: Choose whether the tool runs through a model or an HTTP API call.
toolSettingsInvocationUrlInvalid: Enter a valid http or https URL
toolSettingsSchemaFieldDescriptionPlaceh: What this field is used for
toolSettingsSchemaRequiredFieldRequired: At least one required schema field is required
toolSettingsEmptyDescription: Add a tool, then configure its description and parameter schema.
authSettingsEnabledDescription: When disabled, the external auth endpoint is not called.
authSettingsEndpointUrlDescription: The system sends appId, userId, and token with a POST request. HTTP 200 means the check passed; any other status means it failed.
authSettingsEndpointUrlRequired: Endpoint URL is required when auth is enabled
authSettingsEndpointUrlInvalid: Enter a valid http or https endpoint URL
corsSettingsDescription: Configure Origin URLs that can access the API across origins.
corsSettingsOriginUrlInvalid: Enter a valid http or https Origin URL, for example: https://example.com
corsSettingsEmptyDescription: Add a URL to allow that origin to access the API.
promptGlobalPromptDescription: Controls the assistant's global behavior and can be empty.
promptGlobalPromptPlaceholder: Enter the global prompt, for example: You are an accurate and concise assistant.
promptDialogSystemPromptDescription: Controls the system constraints for each dialog session.
promptDialogSystemPromptPlaceholder: Enter the dialog system prompt, for example: Prioritize the current context.
promptDialogOpeningMessageDescription: Supports Markdown and appears when the dialog first opens.
promptDialogOpeningMessagePlaceholder: Enter the default opening message. Markdown is supported.
promptDialogCapabilityDescription: Control whether the dialog shows speech and image entry points.
promptDialogSpeechEnabledDescription: Allow the dialog to use speech input or speech-related flows.
promptDialogImageEnabledDescription: Allow the dialog to use image upload or image recognition flows.
